title: ShadowRealm / ShadowBot
tagline: Feature-rich Discord bot with a modular command architecture.
description: ShadowBot is a multipurpose Discord bot built for community management — moderation, custom commands, role automation, music queuing, and server analytics — with a clean modular system that makes extending it trivial.
story: My first real bot was a mess of if-else chains. ShadowBot started over from scratch with one rule: every feature lives in its own module, has its own tests, and can be toggled per-server. That constraint made it 10x easier to maintain.
forWho: Discord server owners and community managers who want a capable, customizable bot without touching someone else's codebase.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Command handler pattern with a dynamic module loader. Each command file exports a standard interface (name, description, execute). SQLite stores per-guild config and audit logs.
keyPatterns: Per-guild feature flags via SQLite config table
